headline: Oppenheimer Sees Achievable 2030 Financial Targets for Lennox International Inc. (LII)
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 11 Best Economic Recovery Stocks to Buy Now. Lennox International Inc. (NYSE:LII) is one of the best recovery stocks on this list. TheFly reported on March 5 that Oppenheimer lifted its price objective for LII to $645 from $630 and reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The company’s […]
